elements.body: Spróbuj obliczyć samodzielnie: \[ \left[\left(5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}-2\right)^{\tfrac{1}{2}}+\left(5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}+2\right)^{\tfrac{1}{2}}\right]^2 \] a następnie sprawdź moje rozwiązanie.

elements.latex:
\begin{align*}
                                                                                                \left[\left(5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}-2\right)^{\tfrac{1}{2}}+\left(5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}+2\right)^{\tfrac{1}{2}}\right]^2&=\\
                                                                                                &\color{red}{\left[\text{wzór skróconego mnożenia: } (a+b)^2=a^2+2ab+b^2\right]}\\
                                                                                                &=\left(\left(5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}-2\right)^{\tfrac{1}{2}}\right)^2
                                                                                                +2\left(5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}-2\right)^{\tfrac{1}{2}}\left(5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}+2\right)^{\tfrac{1}{2}}
                                                                                                +\left(\left(5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}+2\right)^{\tfrac{1}{2}}\right)^2\\
                                                                                                &\color{red}{\left[\text{dla każdego }a:\quad \left(a^{\tfrac{1}{2}}\right)^2=a^{\tfrac{1}{2}\cdot 2}=a^1=a\right]}\\
                                                                                                &=\left(5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}-2\right)
                                                                                                +2\left(5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}-2\right)^{\tfrac{1}{2}}\left(5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}+2\right)^{\tfrac{1}{2}}
                                                                                                +\left(5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}+2\right)=\\
                                                                                                &\color{red}{\left[\text{dla każdego }a, b:\quad a^{\tfrac{1}{2}}b^{\tfrac{1}{2}}=(ab)^{\tfrac{1}{2}}\right]}\\
                                                                                                &=\left(5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}-2\right)
                                                                                                +2\left(\left(5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}-2\right)\left(5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}+2\right)\right)^{\tfrac{1}{2}}
                                                                                                +\left(5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}+2\right)=\\
                                                                                                &\color{red}{\left[\text{wzór skróconego mnożenia: } (a-b)(a+b)=a^2-b^2\right]}\\
                                                                                                &=5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}-2
                                                                                                +2\left(\left(5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}\right)^2-2^2\right)^{\tfrac{1}{2}}
                                                                                                +5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}+2=\\
                                                                                                &\color{red}{\left[\text{podobnie, jak wyżej: } \left(5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}\right)^2=5^{\tfrac{1}{2}\cdot 2}=5^1=5\right]}\\
                                                                                                &=5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}-2
                                                                                                +2\left(5-4\right)^{\tfrac{1}{2}}
                                                                                                +5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}+2=\\
                                                                                                &\color{red}{\left[5-4=1,\text{ a }1^{\tfrac{1}{2}}=1\right]}\\
                                                                                                &=5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}-2+2\cdot 1+5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}+2
                                                                                                =5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}-2+2+5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}+2=\\
                                                                                                &\color{red}{\left[\text{upraszczamy, zamieniamy }5^{\tfrac{1}{2}}\text{ w }\sqrt{5}\right]}\\
                                                                                                &=\sqrt{5}+\sqrt{5}+2=2\sqrt{5}+2\\
                                                                                                \end{align*}
